issues.detail: The instructions provide basic error handling but do not cover all edge cases such as CI environments or spinner configuration options.
The skill is specific to Node.js and does not support other runtime environments, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Add a multi-step deploy spinner to a Node CLI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment reuses a single ora() instance across steps with spinner.start/succeed transitions per the multi-step pattern, and reaches for spinner.text mid-run; baseline creates separate spinners per step and misses the documented .succeed/.fail/.warn/.info icon API.

scenarios.name: Build a polished image-processing progress indicator with custom finish symbol
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses stopAndPersist({symbol, text}) with chalk-styled output and updates spinner.text per file as the skill shows, plus picks a documented spinner type ('dots'/'line'/'arc'/'bouncingBar'); baseline writes raw stdout or invents a non-existent ora finish API.
